title: Locked & Loaded
description: A variety of fun crossbow enchantments!
body:
*"Crossbows are ~~not~~ medieval guns"* Locked & Loaded adds a variety of fun crossbow enchantments inspired by guns in games, especially ULTRAKILL. ## Enchantments
Multichambered **Max Level:** 3 (III) **Obtained from:** enchanting table, librarian villagers, random loot **Incompatible with:** quick charge, multishot, pump charge You can load multiple shots by holding crouch, then fire them in sequence when not crouching. | Level | Capacity | | ------- | -------- | | 1 (I) | 2 | | 2 (II) | 4 | | 3 (III) | 6 | ![Demonstration of loading multiple shots with indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wVGP3h6y/images/a0701075b567dd84e36d70cb698d1cfb572c4731.png)
Pump Charge **Max Level:** 1 **Obtained From:** enchanting table, librarian villagers, random loot, pillager outposts, trial chambers **Incompatible with:** multishot, piercing, sharpshooting, rocketry, multichambered You can load two projectiles at a time by holding crouch, up to 8, then fire them all at once like a shotgun. The more projectiles you load, the more spread out the projectiles will be. ![Demonstration of shooting 8 arrows at once](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wVGP3h6y/images/ba12e5e6f7bf6a907b7b891517379bd961a46979.png)
Sharpshooting **Max Level:** 3 (III) **Obtained from:** enchanting table, librarian villagers, random loot, pillager outposts, trial chambers **Incompatible with:** multishot, piercing, pump charge, rocketry Arrows will ricochet off of blocks and arrow-deflecting entities. Arrows will also pierce mobs and reset their pierce count when bouncing, although they cannot pierce shields or other projectile-deflecting mobs the way Piercing can. | Level | Bounces | Pierce | | ------- | ------- | ------ | | 1 (I) | 1 | 1 | | 2 (II) | 2 | 2 | | 3 (III) | 3 | 3 | ![Demonstration of arrow ricohceting to hit multiple targets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wVGP3h6y/images/f3b4d29ad66485ff60f6278dbcf60863d84a7773.png)
Rocketry **Max Level:** 1 **Obtained from:** enchanting table, librarian villagers, random loot, pillager outposts, trial chambers **Incompatible:** multishot, piercing, pump charge, sharpshooting - The crossbow will only load fireworks by default, other projectiles must be in the offhand to be loaded. - Loading an empty firework will give it a random explosion (with 1 firework star per flight duration). - You can rocket jump by detonating a firework near yourself. Fireworks with more explosions will launch you further. - You can ride rockets by right clicking the rocket as it is launched. The firework can be steered using movement keys (WASD). The firework will fly at half speed and last 4x as long, but it will still explode upon impact or when its timer runs out. ![Demonstration of rocket jumping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wVGP3h6y/images/afce4cefef121c1e83ec4a9b9847a5ccb8b2caf7.png)
Recovery **Max Level:** 1 **Obtained from:** enchanting table, librarian villagers, random loot After hitting an entity, the arrow will not be destroyed and can only be picked up by its owner until the owner dies, despawns, or disconnects. This will ensure you can pick up your arrows later to continue fighting.
Curse of Twirling **Max Level:** 1 **Obtained from:** librarian villagers, random loot Instead of shooting a loaded crossbow as normal, you will start spinning the crossbow. Spinning the crossbow for more than a second will cause it to fire normally when released. You can spin two crossbows at once. ![Demonstration of spinning crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wVGP3h6y/images/62ad4a33db53ccad712d646bc68589287f745aac.png)
Magazine (Unobtainable) **Max Level:** 4 (IV) **Incompatible with:** most other crossbow enchantments Loading the crossbow will load `4 * level` projectiles and take a proportionally long time to finish. The projectiles will be fired in sequence with a short firing cooldown. The enchantment is experimental and therefore unobtainable. | Level | Capacity | | ------- | -------- | | 1 (I) | 4 | | 2 (II) | 8 | | 3 (III) | 12 | | 4 (IV) | 16 |
## Other Changes - Vanilla Piercing has been buffed so that in addition to piercing shields, arrows can pierce closed shulkers, breezes, wither armor, and the Ender Dragon when perched. - Pillagers are capable of using the new crossbow enchantments - Pillagers in wave 6+ of raids have an additional chance of spawning with multichambered, rocketry, sharpshooting, or pump charge - Pillagers will load their crossbow before running towards their target - Projectiles ignore invulnerability frames if the last damage was from the same attacker - Offhand crossbow has a unique pose ## Migrating Multichambered and Rocketry were originally from [OmniCrossbow](https://modrinth.com/mod/omnicrossbow) and [Rocket Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/rocket-redux), respectively. The enchantments should migrate seamlessly. Nevertheless, maintain good practice and keep backups of your worlds.
Compat Enchiridion compat is planned when Enchiridion updates. ### Penchant (Loot Rework) - Common: Multichambered - Uncommon: Recovery - Rare: Pump Charge, Sharpshooting, Rocketry
## Credits Some sound effects by floraphonic and freesound_community from Pixabay Many of the enchantments were inspired by ULTRAKILL. Rocket jumping was inspired by TF2 and [Firework Frenzy](https://modrinth.com/mod/firework-frenzy).
